name: Senta
description: Senta and his partner Bunzou are debt collectors with the Akagi Family. The Sannin Tsunade had a large amount of gambling debt with the Family and Senta and his partner were sent to collect. They traveled for three years searching for Tsunade. when they finally found her they learned she had actually paid off the debt a year before and that they had been ordered home by their boss Akagi Shugoro.
